reach_why: Extends familiar AI-epistemology doubts to reframing, mediation, and historical-sequence dependence, but stays within established territory.
novelty_why: Connects fallibilism, representational mediation, and Einstein’s chained reframings to assess apparent AI insight.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing systems’ independent frame-shifts, derivational completion, and mediation-sensitive novelty judgments.
explanation: Apparent AI insight may be conjectural artifact unless it independently reframes problems and completes justificatory bridges.
